# Publicolio
> Publicolio is a zero-config GitHub portfolio generator that turns developer profiles into shareable portfolio pages with design themes and deploy links.

## Main pages
- [Home](https://app.publicolio.qzz.io/): Main app entry for portfolio generation and deployment.

## Key capabilities
- GitHub profile and repository fetching through a CORS proxy
- Optional builder-only token support for owner/private repository access
- Multiple portfolio themes and editor controls
- Shareable URLs with theme and repository selection
- Optional short-link generation with custom domain support

## References
- [CORS Proxy](https://github.com/nishal21/portfolio-cors-proxy): Worker used to proxy GitHub API calls.
- [Shortener Worker Gist](https://gist.github.com/nishal21/ba187199cd00ea6623b6cf4407e3a48d): Worker used for short link creation and redirects.
